particulars.description: All that freehold interest in the land and property known as flats 1-12 elm court, 39 -43 high street, canvey island SS8 7RD and as described at the land registry as 39 high street, canvey island, SS8 7RD and registered at hm land registry with title absolute under title number AA44019 and 41 and 43 high street, canvey island, SS8 7RD and registered at hm land registry with title absolute under title number EX132252.

All that freehold interest in the land and property known as 39 high street, canvey island, SS8 7RD registered at hm land registry with title absolute under title number AA44019. For more details of land, ship, aircraft or intellectual property charged please refer to the instrument.
